title: Zyrphelis perezioides

Within the Asteraceae family, Zyrphelis perezioides is placed in the tribe Cynareae. The genus Zyrphelis is a small group of plants native to South Africa. The classification of Zyrphelis perezioides is based on its morphology and molecular characteristics. Further research may be needed to confirm its precise classification within the Asteraceae family.
